cards.q: What is Pmax on a module datasheet?
cards.a: The maximum power output (W) at Standard Test Conditions (1000 W/m², 25 °C cell, AM1.5).
The module voltage at the maximum power point under STC.
The module current at the maximum power point under STC.

cards.q: Why does Voc rise on a cold morning?
cards.a: Module open-circuit voltage has a negative temperature coefficient — cold cells → higher Voc. This is the worst case to check against controller max input voltage.
A series-connected group of modules. Voltages add; current is set by the lowest-current module.
Two or more strings wired in parallel. Currents add; voltage is set by the lowest-voltage string.
Performance and durability testing for PV modules — qualifies a module's long-term outdoor reliability.
Safety qualification for PV modules — electrical, mechanical, and fire-safety construction requirements.

cards.q: What is a typical early-pass PV derating factor?
cards.a: Around 0.75 — combines temperature, soiling, wiring, mismatch, and conversion losses for a first sizing pass.
Depth of Discharge — the fraction of a battery's nameplate capacity used per cycle. Lead-acid: ~0.5; LFP: ~0.8.
The number of consecutive no-sun days the battery bank can serve full load. Typical: 1.0–1.5 days with a generator, 2–3 days without.
MPPT controllers harvest 5–15% more energy than PWM across changing conditions, paying back the cost difference quickly.
